privileged_info_summary: The task is entirely synthetic, creating a Java console application test case via setup_task.sh. The project uses Apache Maven with Java 17 targeting internationalization (i18n) of a library-manager application. Four Java source files (Main.java, MenuDisplay.java, LibraryManager.java, Book.java) are generated with 14 hardcoded English strings that need extraction into a ResourceBundle. The task requires creating three standard Java properties files (messages_en.properties, messages_es.properties, messages_fr.properties) with a minimum of 15 key-value pairs using ISO 639-1 language codes (en, es for Spanish, fr for French). All metadata claims are accurate and consistent with standard Java internationalization practices and the actual code generated by setup scripts.
